## What does this PR add or change?

<!-- Brief description -->

## Type of entry

<!-- Check one -->

- [ ] Individual skill
- [ ] Skill collection (repository)
- [ ] Tutorial or blog post

## Checklist

**For skills:**
- [ ] The link points to the skill's containing directory, not directly to `SKILL.md`
- [ ] Attribution is included as `by [@author](https://github.com/author)`

**For skill collections:**
- [ ] The link points to the repository root

**For tutorials and blog posts:**
- [ ] The link points to the post or page directly
- [ ] Author attribution is included (GitHub handle or plain name)

**All entries:**
- [ ] The description is one sentence and ends with a period
- [ ] The entry is placed under the correct section (or a new section is justified)
- [ ] The linked content is publicly accessible
